summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2. AdminPanel.tsx now enforces owner-only access by showing AccessDeniedScreen for non-owners and a loading spinner while the owner check resolves. The Navbar summary confirms the 'Customize Site' button is only shown after ownerFetched is true and isOwner is confirmed. The useIsOwner hook uses isPending-based loading to prevent premature false negatives. Both requirements appear to be addressed correctly with no hallucinated features detected.
